name: Lake Minnequa Park
description: Lake Minnequa Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pueblo, CO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Mineral Palace Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Mineral Palace Park Pickleball Courts in Pueblo, CO! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Pueblo City Park Tennis Complex
description: Pueblo City Park Tennis Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pueblo, CO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Pueblo Tennis & Pickleball Center
description: Come play pickleball at Pueblo Tennis & Pickleball Center in Pueblo, CO! There are 6 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, lights, locker rooms, food, trainers or lessons, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Pueblo West Civic Center
description: Pueblo West Civic Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pueblo, CO. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Reps
description: Reps is a place to play pickleball in Pueblo, CO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — $10 drop-in fee / $40 membership fee per month

name: St. Charles Mesa Recreation Center

Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: YMCA Of Pueblo
description: YMCA Of Pueblo is a place to play pickleball in Pueblo, CO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.
